incident.event_summary: SCAN01 (10.20.30.40) performed a scheduled vulnerability scan on WEB01 (192.0.2.10) using TCP port scanning and Nmap scripting.
raw_logs: SCAN01 (10.20.30.40) performed a scheduled vulnerability scan on WEB01 (192.0.2.10) using TCP port scanning and Nmap scripting.
WEB01 (192.0.2.10) transferred over 100 MB of encrypted data to AWS S3 (52.95.110.45) as part of its routine backup process.
WEB01 (192.0.2.10) initiated an outbound SSH connection to BACK01 (10.20.40.50) for backup management tasks.
An unknown external IP (203.0.113.77) attempted to exploit a memory corruption vulnerability in WEB01's Apache server, but the attack was blocked.
